pact://pact-demo-store.name: Pact Demo Store
pact://pact-demo-store.description: Demo e-commerce store for the Pact privacy-preserving agent network.
pact://pact-demo-store.privacy_note: Product, quantity, and delivery speed go through AI; card number, CVV, and address are AES-256 encrypted.

pact://example-domain-consulting.name: Example Domain Consulting
pact://example-domain-consulting.description: Example Domain Consulting is a digital solutions agency that designs clean, effective developer-facing resources and system sandboxes. They specialize in building high-quality documentation, mock environments, and developer experience workshops to optimize your integration workflows.
pact://example-domain-consulting.privacy_note: Your personal details, including full name, email, and phone, are completely encrypted and hidden from the AI, which only accesses date, time, and special requests to fulfill your inquiry.

products.name: Documentation Review & Audit
products.description: An in-depth review of your technical examples and documentation clarity.

products.name: Mock Environment Setup
products.description: Custom sandbox and mock API endpoints tailored for operations testing.

products.name: Developer Experience Workshop
products.description: A half-day virtual team training session on documentation best practices.

pact://the-corner-store-boutique.name: The Corner Store Boutique
pact://the-corner-store-boutique.description: The Corner Store Boutique is a charming neighborhood shop offering curated artisanal goods, unique local gifts, and personalized shopping experiences in a warm, welcoming atmosphere.
pact://the-corner-store-boutique.privacy_note: Personal details like your full name, email, and phone number are entirely encrypted and bypassed, while AI-safe booking details such as date, time, party size, and special requests are processed to assist you.

products.name: 1-on-1 Personal Shopping Session
products.description: A dedicated 60-minute styling and shopping consultation with our lead curator.

products.name: Private After-Hours Group Shopping
products.description: Exclusive access to the store for up to 6 guests with complimentary refreshments.

products.name: Custom Gift Box Curation
products.description: Let us curate and beautifully wrap a custom selection of products for your recipient.

products.name: Seasonal Workshop Ticket
products.description: Admission to our monthly hands-on crafting or local maker workshop.
